description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front features a driveway leading to a single-car garage, a paved walkway, and a small landscaped yard with trees. Large windows and open spaces are visible, suggesting an open-plan interior with ample natural light. The exterior is primarily white with subtle gray accents, and the landscaping includes both deciduous and evergreen trees. The rear and side views show additional windows and a partially enclosed outdoor area, possibly a patio or terrace. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped yard with two trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the flat roof and tree placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying minimal windows, a plain white facade, and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open garage, driveway, and more of the yard and tree arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved walkway, and no porch or overhang, flanked by landscaping.
